mapper.select:
SELECT T.TABLE_ID AS tableId, T.SERVER_ID AS serverId, T.TABLE_CD AS tableCd, T.TABLE_NM AS tableNm, T.TABLE_JOIN_NM AS tableJoinNm, T.DESCRIPTION AS description, T.USE_YN AS useYn, T.SAVE_PREQ_CD AS savePreqCd, T.SAVE_PREQ AS savePreq, C.DETAIL_NM AS savePreqNm, T.EXP_PREQ_CD AS expPreqCd, T.EXP_PREQ AS expPreq, CC.DETAIL_NM AS expPreqNm FROM mhdb.TB_TABLE_INFO T LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL C ON T.SAVE_PREQ_CD = C.DETAIL_CD AND 'SAVE_PREQ_CD' = C.GROUP_CD AND 'Y' = C.USE_YN LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL CC ON T.EXP_PREQ_CD = CC.DETAIL_CD AND 'EXP_PREQ_CD' = CC.GROUP_CD AND 'Y' = CC.USE_YN WHERE 1=1
AND T.SERVER_ID = #{serverId}::integer
AND T.USE_YN like concat('%', #{useYn}, '%')
AND T.TABLE_ID = #{tableId}::integer
AND ( UPPER(T.TABLE_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{tableNm}) || '%' OR UPPER(T.TABLE_CD) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{tableNm}) || '%' OR UPPER(T.TABLE_JOIN_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{tableNm}) || '%' )
ORDER BY T.TABLE_NM

SELECT C.ATTR_CD AS attrCd, C.ATTR_NM AS attrNm, C.ATTR_TYPE_CD AS attrTypeCd, D.DETAIL_NM AS attrTypeNm, C.ATTR_SIZE AS attrSize, C.DECIMAL_SIZE AS decimalSize, C.ATTR_NULL_YN AS attrNullYn, C.USE_YN AS attrUseYn, C.ATTR_ORDER AS attrOrder, C.SORT_INDEX AS sortIndex, C.WHERE_INDEX AS whereIndex, C.OUTPUT_INDEX AS outputIndex, C.DATE_TYPE_YN AS dateTypeYn, C.TIME_TYPE_YN AS timeTypeYn FROM mhdb.TB_TABLE_INFO I LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_TABLE_ATTR C ON I.TABLE_ID = C.TABLE_ID AND 'Y' = C.USE_YN LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL D ON C.ATTR_TYPE_CD = D.DETAIL_CD AND 'ATTR_TYPE_CD' = D.GROUP_CD WHERE 1=1 AND I.USE_YN = 'Y' AND I.TABLE_ID = #{tableId}::integer
AND I.SERVER_ID = #{serverId}::integer
ORDER BY C.ATTR_ORDER

SELECT T.TABLE_ID AS tableId, T.TABLE_CD AS tableCd, T.TABLE_NM AS tableNm FROM mhdb.TB_TABLE_INFO T WHERE 1=1 AND T.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND T.TABLE_ID = #{tableId}::integer
AND ( UPPER(T.TABLE_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{tableNm}) || '%' OR UPPER(T.TABLE_CD) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{tableNm}) || '%' OR UPPER(T.TABLE_JOIN_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{tableNm}) || '%' )
ORDER BY T.TABLE_NM
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_TABLE_INFO ( TABLE_ID, TABLE_CD, TABLE_NM, TABLE_JOIN_NM, SERVER_ID, SAVE_PREQ_CD, SAVE_PREQ, EXP_PREQ_CD, EXP_PREQ, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{table_id}::integer, #{table_cd}, #{table_nm}, #{table_join_nm}, #{serverId}::integer, #{save_preq_cd}, #{save_preq}::numeric, #{exp_preq_cd}, #{exp_preq}::numeric, #{description}, 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE mhdb.TB_TABLE_INFO SET TABLE_CD = #{table_cd}, TABLE_NM = #{table_nm}, TABLE_JOIN_NM = #{table_join_nm}, SAVE_PREQ_CD = #{save_preq_cd}, SAVE_PREQ = #{save_preq}::numeric, EXP_PREQ_CD = #{exp_preq_cd}, EXP_PREQ = #{exp_preq}::numeric, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, USE_YN = #{use_yn} WHERE TABLE_ID = #{table_id}::integer
UPDATE mhdb.TB_TABLE_INFO SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE TABLE_ID = #{tableId}::integer
UPDATE mhdb.TB_TABLE_ATTR SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE TABLE_ID = #{tableId}::integer AND ATTR_CD = #{attrCd}

UPDATE mhdb.TB_TABLE_ATTR SET ATTR_NM = #{attr_nm}, ATTR_TYPE_CD = #{attr_type_cd}, ATTR_SIZE = #{attr_size}::numeric, DECIMAL_SIZE = #{decimal_size}::numeric, ATTR_NULL_YN = #{attr_null_yn}, DATE_TYPE_YN = #{date_type_yn}, TIME_TYPE_YN = #{time_type_yn}, SORT_INDEX = #{sort_index}::integer, WHERE_INDEX = #{where_index}::integer, OUTPUT_INDEX = #{output_index}::integer, ATTR_ORDER = #{attr_order}::integer WHERE TABLE_ID = #{table_id}::integer AND ATTR_CD = #{attr_cd}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mhdb.TB_TABLE_ATTR WHERE TABLE_ID = #{tableId}::integer AND ATTR_CD = #{attrCd}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mhdb.TB_TABLE_ATTR WHERE TABLE_ID = #{tableId}::integer AND ATTR_CD = #{attrCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE mhdb.TB_TABLE_ATTR SET ATTR_NM = #{attr_nm}, ATTR_TYPE_CD = #{attr_type_cd}, ATTR_SIZE = #{attr_size}::numeric, DECIMAL_SIZE = #{decimal_size}::numeric, ATTR_NULL_YN = #{attr_null_yn}, DATE_TYPE_YN = #{date_type_yn}, TIME_TYPE_YN = #{time_type_yn}, SORT_INDEX = #{sort_index}::integer, WHERE_INDEX = #{where_index}::integer, OUTPUT_INDEX = #{output_index}::integer, ATTR_ORDER = #{attr_order}::integer, USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE TABLE_ID = #{table_id}::integer AND ATTR_CD = #{attr_cd}
